codeReview.summary: Fix comprehensively addresses both blocking bugs from the prior review. Cache eviction now properly removes expired entries in is_cached() and get_cached(). get_lease_ttl() now queries Vault's sys/leases/lookup API via the new lookup_lease() method. All verification steps passed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The prior review noted that worker attempted to read .factory/services.yaml and it didn't exist. The file now exists at the repo root (verified at /Users/ludwigjonsson/Projects/swell/.factory/services.yaml). This issue appears resolved.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: File exists with documented services: swell-daemon, build, test, lint commands

summary: Fix is complete and passes review. Both blocking bugs from tools-vault-integration are resolved: (1) Cache eviction now works correctly - is_cached() and get_cached() now evict expired entries using write() locks and cache.remove(key). (2) get_lease_ttl() now returns actual TTL by calling the new lookup_lease() method which queries Vault's /v1/sys/leases/lookup API. All 11 vault tests pass, clippy passes with no warnings. Worker followed Rust skill correctly.
